memoryArtifacts.headline: Amicie de Courtenay (1250-1275)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Amicie de Courtenay, née en 1250, morte en 1275, était la fille de Pierre de Courtenay (1218 - † 1250), seigneur de Conches et de Mehun, et de Perrenelle de Joigny, fille de Gaucher de Joigny.

Son pè …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Amicie de Courtenay於1250年出生在法國諾門迪艾康查--時，她的父親Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches32歲，母親Pétronille DE JOIGNY20歲。她於1262年6月13日與Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois在法國瑟-吉馬內瑟-波特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1275年在義大利拉其羅馬享年26歲，埋葬在義大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁三 喬瓦尼 艾爾 納迪索波爾薩諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amicie de Courtenay于1250年出生在法国諾門迪艾康查--时，她的父亲Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches32岁，母亲Pétronille DE JOIGNY20岁。她于1262年6月13日与Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois在法国瑟-吉馬內瑟-波特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1275年在意大利拉其羅馬享年26岁，埋葬在意大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁三 喬瓦尼 艾爾 納迪索波爾薩諾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Amicie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval given name derived from Latin ami(ci)tia ‘friendship’ see Amity .

en.lifeSummary: When Amicie de Courtenay was born in 1250, in Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandy, France, her father, Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches, was 32 and her mother, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, was 20. She married Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois on 13 June 1262, in Seine-Port, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1275, in Roma, Lazio, Italy, at the age of 26, and was buried in Bolzano, San Giovanni al Natisone, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amicie de Courtenay est née en 1250, à Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois le 13 juin 1262, à Seine-Port, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1275, à Rome, Lazio, Italie, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à Bolzano, San Giovanni al Natisone, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amicie de Courtenay 1250 in Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches 32 und ihre Mutter Pétronille DE JOIGNY 20. Sie hat am 13. Juni 1262 in Seine-Port, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1275 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Roma, Lazio, Italien und wurde in Bolzano, San Giovanni al Natisone, Udine, Friaul-Julisch Venetien, Italien begraben.

Lei sposato Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois il 13 giugno 1262, nel Seine-Port, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Amicie de Courtenayが1250年にフランスノーマンディエウアコンチェス-エン-オウチェで生まれた時，父Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conchesは32歳，母Pétronille DE JOIGNYは20歳であった。1262年6月13日にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンセアイネ-プオルトでRobert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1275年にイタリアラズオロマで26歳で死去し，イタリアフリウリ ベンエズア ギウリアウディンサン ギオヴァニ アル ナティソンボルザノにて埋葬された。

ko.Bolzano, San Giovanni al Natisone, Udine: 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 산 조반이 앨 냇이손 볼자노
ko.lifeSummary: Amicie de Courtenay(이)가 1250년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 콘체스--우체에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Pétronille DE JOIGNY(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1262년 6월 13일 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 세이인-포트에서 Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1275년 이탈리아 라지오 로마에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 산 조반이 앨 냇이손 볼자노에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amicie de Courtenay nasceu em 1250, em Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois em 13 de junho de 1262, em Seine-Port, Seine-et-Marne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1275, em Roma, Lazio, Itália, com 26 anos, e foi sepultada em Bolzano, San Giovanni al Natisone, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amicie de Courtenay родилась в 1250 г. в местности кончес-ен-оуч, эур, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Pétronille DE JOIGNY, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois 13 июня 1262 г. в местности сине-порт, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1275 г. в местности рома, лазио, Италия в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности болзано, сан джиованни аль натисоун, удаин, фрюли винезя гюля, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amicie de Courtenay nació en 1250, en Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Pétronille DE JOIGNY, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois el 13 de junio de 1262, en Seine-Port, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1275, en Roma, Lazio, Italia, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultada en Bolzano, San Giovanni al Natisone, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italia.
